case_title: BERTHA HAMPTON VS. DAVE M. ATKIN MD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAMPTON, BERTHA AS TO DEFENDANT ATKIN MD, DAVE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF HAMPTON, BERTHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-21-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ATKIN MD, DAVE M.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ATKIN MD, DAVE M.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE DATED JULY 1, 2009.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-27-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. COPY SENT PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KALPAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS BRETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY HAMPTON, BERTHA ATKIN MD, DAVE M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMPTON, BERTHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATKIN MD, DAVE M. PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL MALPRACTICE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROC. 340.5. THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S STATEMENTS WERE MADE WITHOUT MALICE. AS SUCH, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO OVERCOME DEFENDANT'S DEFENSE TO HER DEFAMATION CLAIM THAT THE COMMUNICATION WAS PRIVILEGED. SEE CIVIL CODE 47(C). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
